title: Charge case outside screen/third screen, left zoom in/out
scenario: Quick Setup Guide third screen zoom toggles when tapping left circle button on charge case outside view
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to the Quick Setup Guide (QSG) from the Home screen.
Swipe or navigate to the third screen of the QSG (showing the charge case outside view).
Click the left circle button on the third screen.
Click the left circle button again.
expected: Clicking the left circle button zooms in and displays new text. Clicking the circle button again zooms out to the original screen showing the charge case outside view.
